steps.text: Hoist the sails! {toy} is captain of a pirate ship sailing across {room}.
Climb to the crow's nest (a chair or cushion) and shout what you see.
A storm hits! Rock {toy} side to side and brace against the waves.
The lookout spots an island. Steer toward it with {toy} at the wheel.
On the beach, two paths split — which way does {toy} lead?
You hack through vines and find buried treasure! {toy} crowns you First Mate.
You climb high and spot another ship — {toy} signals with a flag and you trade gold.
Strap {toy} into the rocket! {room} is mission control.
Count down from {count} loud and clear.
Blast off! Crouch low then leap up high holding {toy}.
Float weightless — wave your arms slowly like an astronaut.
An alien ship appears on the radar. Squint and focus.
What does {toy} do about the aliens?
The aliens cheer and teach {toy} a {adjective} space dance — show me your moves!
You blast home in record time and {toy} earns the Speed Pilot badge.
{toy} is the brave knight defending the castle of {room}.
Build a fort wall with cushions or chairs — three pieces will do.
Patrol the perimeter with {toy} held high like a banner.
A dragon roars in the distance! Listen carefully.
How does {toy} face the dragon?
You leap forward swinging your {body_part} like a sword! The dragon flees.
You tiptoe behind the dragon and tickle its tail. It giggles and rolls over!
You offer a {prop} and the dragon snuggles up. {toy} has a new friend.
{toy} packs the explorer kit — you're heading deep into the jungle of {room}.
Hack through tall grass by waving your arms like machetes.
Listen for jungle sounds — chirps, hoots, distant drums.
Spot a {adjective} animal hiding behind a {prop} — describe it to {toy}.
A river blocks the path. The water roars below.
How does {toy} cross the river?
You leap and swing yodeling — {toy} cheers from the other side. You made it!
You stack three pillows into a raft and paddle across with {toy} steering.
{toy} suits up — it's a deep sea dive into the secret ocean of {room}.
Which sea creature does {toy} want to find first?
You drift through dark water and the jellyfish glows {adjective} pink!
You squeeze through a porthole and find barnacled chests inside.
The whale sings a low rumble and lets {toy} ride on its back.
All paths lead to a sunken treasure chest! Pry it open with {toy}.
Inside are pearls and a magic {prop}. {toy} declares you Captain of the Deep!
{toy} smells dinosaurs nearby — grab the binoculars and scout {room}.
Which trail does {toy} follow?
You stomp like a T-rex following the prints, shaking the floor!
You tiptoe like a velociraptor, watching for traps.
Both trails lead to a nest! Three speckled eggs sit inside.
An egg cracks — a baby dino peeks out and snuggles up to {toy}.
Mission accepted! {toy} gets a secret coded message about {room}.
Sneak across the floor without making a sound — silent as a cat.
Hide behind a {prop} and peek out for clues.
Decode the secret message by counting to {count} backward.
An alarm trips! Red lights flash everywhere.
How does {toy} escape headquarters?
You crawl on your tummy through the vent and pop out outside. Mission accomplished!
You wrap a blanket cape on {toy} and march right past the guards. Smooth!
The kitchen is a volcano and {toy} is on a rescue mission to {room}!
Lava is everywhere — leap from cushion to cushion only.
Spot a stranded toy that needs saving — point it out.
Toss a rope (a scarf or sock) toward the rescue.
The volcano rumbles louder! Smoke fills the air.
How does {toy} get everyone out?
You sprint with {toy} tucked under your arm. Safe outside! Cheers all around.
A helicopter lowers a ladder. {toy} climbs up and waves from the sky.
Step right up! {toy} is the ringmaster of the {room} circus.
Which circus act does {toy} perform first?
Walk a straight line heel-to-toe with {toy} balanced on your head!
Roar mighty roars and hold up a ring — the lion (a pillow) leaps through!
Toss three soft toys gently up and down. {toy} keeps score.
Time for the grand finale — everyone bows together as the crowd cheers!
{toy} found robot blueprints hidden in {room}!
Gather {count} household objects to be robot parts.
Snap the parts together with imaginary bolts and screws.
Power on! Make a long beeeeeep sound and shake your {body_part}.
What is the robot's special ability?
The robot lifts the entire couch (pretend!) and {toy} rides on top!
PEW PEW! Laser eyes melt invisible obstacles. {toy} salutes the new hero.
The robot does the {adjective} disco shuffle and {toy} joins in!
{toy} just got accepted to wizard school! Class is in {room}.
Pick up your wand (any nearby {prop}) and practice swishing it.
Chant the magic word: ABRA-{action_verb}-CADABRA! Say it three times.
Sparks fly! Your potion is bubbling over.
A {adjective} owl swoops in carrying a sealed letter for {toy}.
The letter says pick a magical specialty:
Whoosh! Snap your fingers and pretend a fireball appears. {toy} bows to your power.
A flock of birds (pretend!) circles {toy} and you can talk to every one.
Crisis! The city of {room} needs a superhero — that's {toy}!
Tie a blanket cape around your shoulders.
Strike your hero pose — hands on hips, chin up high.
An emergency call! Listen for the siren.
Run to the scene as fast as you can with {toy}.
Two emergencies at once! Who does {toy} save first?

choices.label: A cat stuck in a tree
A baby in a runaway stroller

steps.text: You leap up and gently lift the cat down. The whole crowd cheers for {toy}!
You sprint to catch the stroller and skid to a stop. The baby giggles. Hero!
All aboard! {toy} is conductor of the express train through {room}.
Which destination does {toy} call out?
Climb-climb-climb the steep hills! Lean back as the train tilts up.
Roll past sandy dunes — wave at sea birds out the window.
Smell the cookies baking — the rails turn into chocolate streams!
All trains pass through the long dark tunnel. Make a loud TOOT-TOOT!
You arrive at last. {toy} stamps your ticket and you cheer together!
{toy} wants to go camping right here in {room}!
Build a tent from blankets and chairs. Make it cozy.
Crawl inside with {toy} and a flashlight (or pretend one).
Listen for nighttime sounds — owls, crickets, leaves rustling.
What do you do at the campsite?
You whisper a tale of a {adjective} ghost. {toy} hides under the blanket — boo!
Stick a marshmallow on a twig and rotate slowly. Yum — sticky and gooey!
Chef {toy} is opening a five-star restaurant in {room}. Tie on your apron!
What kind of dish is {toy} making tonight?
Stir the giant pot fast. Add a {adjective} pinch of imaginary spice!
Whisk the batter — beat your {body_part} like a mixer!
Toss the leaves high in the air — catch them like a tossing master!
Now plate it beautifully. Garnish with imaginary flowers and ring the bell!
The food critic ({toy}) takes a bite and gives you {count} stars!
{toy} is opening the world's best car wash in {room}!
Wave drivers in by pointing at imaginary cars zooming up.
Spray water (pretend) all over the first car. Make a SHHHHH sound.
Scrub-scrub-scrub the {adjective} car with big arm circles.
Rinse off the soap with a big imaginary hose.
Drying time! How does {toy} get the car shiny?
WHOOOSH! Pretend a giant fan blasts the car dry. Your hair flies back!
Pat-pat-pat with imaginary towels. Sparkly clean! {toy} hands you a tip.
Welcome to the zoo! {toy} is your tour guide through {room}.
Which exhibit does {toy} visit first?
The lion lets out a mighty ROAR! Roar back, even louder!
The monkeys swing and screech! Scratch your head and act silly.
The snake hisses and slithers. Wiggle on the floor like a snake!
It's feeding time! Help {toy} pretend-feed a treat to the animals.
Wave goodbye to all the animals. {toy} thanks you for the visit!
Detective {toy} just got a case — a missing {prop} in {room}!
Pull out your magnifying glass (cup your hand) and search the area.
Find {count} suspicious clues — point at each one.
Question a suspect (a stuffed animal or pillow) with serious questions.
Suddenly, a new clue! A {adjective} smudge on the wall.
All eyes on the suspects! Who does {toy} accuse?
The teddy confesses! {toy} cracks the case and you both shake hands.
The toy car races away — you chase it down and recover the {prop}!
Welcome to the {room} Olympics! {toy} is your champion.
Stretch your arms up high and touch your toes for warmup.
Which event does {toy} compete in?
Take {count} big steps back, run forward, and LEAP!
On your marks... GO! Run in place super fast for ten seconds.
Walk a straight line heel-to-toe, arms out wide. Don't fall off!
Step onto the podium. {toy} hangs an imaginary gold medal around your neck!
{toy} dares you to enter the haunted house — actually it's just {room}!
Creak open the imaginary door slowly... eeeeerrrr...
Tiptoe past a spooky portrait. Its eyes seem to follow you.
Hear a ghostly OOOOOOOO! Hold {toy} tight.
A {adjective} cobweb tickles your face! Brush it off your {body_part}.
Two creaky doors block the way out — pick fast!
It opens to a friendly ghost party! Everyone dances. {toy} joins in!
It leads to sunny daylight outside. You and {toy} cheer — escape!
Mission briefing: {toy} the ninja must cross {room} unseen!
Tie an imaginary headband and crouch down low.
Tiptoe past invisible laser beams — duck under and step over.
Roll behind a {prop} when the guard turns around.
How does {toy} reach the scroll?
You scale up using imaginary handholds. Snatch the scroll! Mission accomplished.
POOF! Throw down the smoke and dash through. {toy} bows in approval.
Grab the binoculars — {toy} is leading a safari through {room}!
Which habitat does {toy} explore?
Trudge through hot sand. Spot a camel resting under a {adjective} tree.
Sneak through tall grass — a giraffe nibbles leaves nearby.
Climb misty rocks — a snow leopard watches from above.
All trails lead to the watering hole. Sit quietly with {toy} and watch the animals drink.
An elephant trumpets goodbye! Wave back with both arms.
Brrrr! {toy} bundles up — the temperature in {room} just dropped to arctic!
Strap on imaginary snowshoes and trudge through deep snow.
Scan the icy horizon for a {adjective} polar bear.
Crack! Thin ice underfoot — leap to a sturdy floe!
How does {toy} reach the research base?
Mush mush! Pretend to crack the reins and the dogs zoom across the ice. Yip yip!
Crunch through ice with the ship's mighty hull. {toy} steers from the bridge.
It's market day! {toy} sets up a stall in busy {room}.
What does {toy} sell at the market?
Bottle up sparkly imaginary liquids. Shout: GET YOUR {adjective} POTIONS!
Stack pretend apples and oranges in pyramids. Polish each one shiny.
Display silly hats on your {body_part} to attract customers.
A customer wants to haggle! Offer {count} coins back and forth.
Sold! High-five {toy} — the stall is a hit!
Listen carefully — {toy} hears tiny bells in the corner of {room}.
Which fairy does {toy} meet first?
Pink petals swirl around. The flower fairy hops onto your {body_part}!
Tiny droplets sparkle. The water fairy splashes {toy} and giggles.
All the fairies invite you to a dance. Spin slowly with {toy} held high.
The fairies leave a {adjective} flower as thanks. Tuck it safe with {toy}.
Engines roar! {toy} is the star driver at the {room} speedway.
Buckle up. Squeeze the steering wheel tight!
On your marks... GO! Run in place super fast — vroooom!
A sharp turn ahead! Lean to one side dramatically.
Two cars are right beside you at the final lap!
WHOOSH! You blast past everyone and cross the finish line first. Trophy time!
You squeak through a tight gap and edge ahead at the line. Victory by an inch!
Land ho! {toy} unfolds a tattered map of {room} with X marks the spot.
Wade through pretend tide pools — careful of the crabs!
Push through palm fronds — wave your arms to part the leaves.
Spot the X on the ground. Dig with imaginary shovels!
Clunk! You hit the treasure chest. Pry it open with a {prop}.
Lift the lid slowly — what's inside the chest?
Coins everywhere! Toss them in the air with {toy} laughing beside you.
A glowing {adjective} key! It opens a secret door — what's behind it next time?
{toy} declares it's a tasting tour through {room} — {count} stops total!
Which station does {toy} sample first?
WHOA spicy! Fan your {body_part} and stomp around!
Mmmmm sweet! Smile huge and rub your tummy.
PUCKER! Squish your face and shiver all over!
Now {toy} judges — give the dish a thumbs up or thumbs down!
The chef hands you a winner's ribbon. {toy} pins it on you proudly!
Fire up the burner! {toy}'s hot air balloon rises above {room}.
Which way does the wind blow {toy}?
Float through fluffy clouds. Reach out and grab a handful — soft and bouncy!
Sail over a shimmering rainbow river. Wave at the colorful fish below.
Time to descend! Pull the rope gently and the balloon settles down.
You and {toy} step out and bow to the crowd that's gathered. What a journey!
Crown {toy}! Today {toy} rules the kingdom of {room}.
Sit {toy} on a throne (a chair with a blanket).
Bow before the king and present a {prop} as a royal gift.
A royal messenger arrives! Read the urgent letter aloud.
Royal decree time! What does King {toy} command?
Roll out the feast! Pretend-eat seven courses with your royal {body_part}!
March {count} knights out the door — {toy} watches from the balcony, proud.
{toy} sets up an obstacle course in {room} — but you can ONLY use your {body_part}!
First trial: {action_verb} across the room using only your {body_part} for balance.
Pick up a {prop} using ONLY your {body_part}. No hands allowed!
Carry the {prop} {count} steps without dropping it.
Final challenge time — what does {toy} pick?
Hop {count} times in a row holding the {prop} on your {body_part}. Champion!
Wiggle every part of you while holding {toy}. {toy} laughs uncontrollably!
Find a {prop}, a second {prop}, and a third — line them up across {room}.
Now {action_verb} from the first {prop} to the second.
{action_verb} from the second {prop} to the third — keep your {body_part} steady!
{toy} times the next round. Go fast or go fancy?
Race back through the props in {count} seconds! {toy} cheers — new record!
Spin and twirl past each {prop} like a {adjective} dancer. {toy} claps in awe.
{toy} challenges you to {action_verb} {count} times in a row across {room}!
First {action_verb}: do it {adjective} — {toy} judges the style.
Second {action_verb}: do it sideways while waving a {prop}.
Third {action_verb}: do it backward holding {toy} on your {body_part}.
Encore time! Pick the grand finale:
Crouch low and LAUNCH! Biggest {action_verb} of the day — {toy} gives a 10!
Move sloooowly like a sloth. Every motion stretches forever. {toy} giggles.
{toy} casts a spell — {room} is now an entirely new place!
What does {room} transform into?
Squelch through mud — lift your {body_part} high with each step!
Crawl through the dark cave — your {body_part} brushes the rocky walls.
Float weightless — kick your {body_part} like swimming through air!
A {adjective} creature appears with a {prop} in its claws!
{toy} trades a smile for the {prop}. New friend made — quest done!
{toy} hands you a quest scroll — exactly {count} tasks await in {room}.
Task one: find {count} {adjective} objects and pile them up.
Task two: {action_verb} around the pile {count} times.
Task three: balance a {prop} on your {body_part} for {count} seconds.
Final task — {toy} lets you pick:
ROOOOAARRR {count} times! {toy} flinches then bursts into laughter.
Sing LA-LA-LA at the top of your lungs! {toy} conducts with a {prop}.
{toy} is feeling {adjective} today. Match the energy in {room}!
Walk {adjective}-style across the room — show {toy} how.
Pick up a {prop} the {adjective} way and carry it on your {body_part}.
Now {toy} changes mood. Pick a new feeling:
Tiptoe past {toy} without a sound. Don't even let your {body_part} squeak!
Shout your name {count} times and stomp around. {toy} cheers wildly!
Drift around with arms outstretched, humming softly. {toy} sways with you.
Quick — find a {adjective} {prop} hidden somewhere in {room}.
Hold the {adjective} {prop} on your {body_part} and walk to {toy}.
{toy} inspects it carefully — is it the right one? Spin it slowly.
{toy}'s verdict is in — what happens with the {prop} next?

choices.label: Use it as a magic wand

steps.text: Wave the {prop} and shout {action_verb}! Sparks fly from your {body_part}!
Find a different {prop} and swap. {toy} approves — better choice!
{toy} starts a brand new dance craze: the {body_part} shimmy!
Move only your {body_part} for {count} seconds. The rest of you stays still!
Now add a {prop} — twirl it as your {body_part} keeps shaking!
Tempo change! How does {toy} call it?
Shake your {body_part} as fast as you can! {toy} can barely keep up!
Move your {body_part} sloooooooowly like underwater. {toy} hums along.
{toy} invents a game: every step you {action_verb} adds a new layer!
Layer one: just {action_verb} across {room}.
Layer two: {action_verb} while waving a {prop}.
Layer three: {action_verb} {adjective}-style with {toy} on your {body_part}!
Boss layer time — pick the wildest twist:
{action_verb} with the silliest face you can make! {toy} can't stop laughing!
Shout HOORAY at every step! Your voice echoes off the walls.
{toy} marks {count} stations around {room}. It's a relay!
At station one: {action_verb} in place {count} times.
Sprint to station two: balance a {prop} on your {body_part}.
Sprint to station three: do a {adjective} pose for {toy} to admire.
Finish line approaches! How do you cross it?
Crouch low and LAUNCH across the line! {toy} celebrates the photo finish!
Twirl all the way across. Wave at {toy} mid-spin — what a stylish finish!
Showdown! {toy} stands at the other end of {room}. Pick your move:
ZIP! Whip out a finger-pistol and shout BANG! {toy} clutches its chest dramatically.
Wink, then dance instead. {toy} laughs so hard it falls over!
Dance wildly with {toy} until you hear the magic word!
FREEZE! {toy} calls a pose — which one?
Hold perfectly still! Don't even blink. {toy} inspects with a magnifying eye.
Freeze in a {adjective} animal shape — {toy} guesses which one!
{toy} sets a {count}-second timer. Ready, set...
GO! What burst does {toy} pick?
{action_verb} as fast as you can until time's up! {toy} shouts STOP!
Make the wackiest noises possible — {toy} laughs the whole way through!
Stand face-to-face with {toy}. Whatever {toy} does, you copy!
Pick the mirror challenge {toy} starts with:
Move sloooowly — every motion of your {body_part} mirrors {toy}'s.
Pull the silliest face you can! {toy} matches it back. Crack up first loses!
Lean in close — {toy} has a secret to share in {room}.
{toy} whispers — what's the secret about?
There's a {adjective} treasure under the couch! Tiptoe over to check.
{toy} is throwing you a surprise party! Pretend to be surprised!
Wave your {body_part} and chant {action_verb}! Sparks fly (in your mind).
An ancient prophecy! {toy} must save {room} from a curse.
Pack your bag — grab a {prop}, a snack, and a brave heart.
Cross the threshold and step outside the safe zone.
A wise wizard greets you with a riddle. Think hard about your answer.
The wizard points to two roads:
Trees rustle around you. A talking fox offers a clue.
Climb high — your {body_part} aches. A snow goat shows the way.
The cursed beast appears! It has {count} heads, all roaring.
How does {toy} defeat the beast?
BAM! The {prop} strikes true and the curse lifts. {toy} crowns you a hero!
The beast laughs so hard the curse shatters. {toy} bursts into proud applause!
Buckle up! {toy} announces a world tour starting from {room}.
First stop: hot desert. Trudge through pretend sand dunes.
Spot a camel — wave hello and feed it an imaginary date.
Second stop: snowy tundra. Shiver and rub your arms!
Build a tiny snowman with {toy} (or a sock pile).
Third stop: rainforest. Listen for monkey calls and bird trills.
Which path does {toy} choose in the rainforest?
Climb tall trees! Swing arm-over-arm like a monkey holding {toy}.
Wade into pretend water — splash with your {body_part}!
All trails head home. Board the imaginary plane and buckle in.
Touchdown back in {room}! Wave at every souvenir you didn't bring.
Punch the time clock! {toy} runs the toy factory in {room}.
Inspect the conveyor belt — your {body_part} is the scanner.
Stack {count} imaginary boxes neatly in a row.
ALERT! A box is wobbling. Steady it carefully!
Lunch break decision — what does {toy} do?
Run-run-run! Pick up {count} more boxes super fast!
Sketch a {adjective} new toy design with {toy} cheering you on.
Time to ship! Load the imaginary truck with all your boxes.
Wave goodbye as the truck rolls out. {toy} hangs the EMPLOYEE-OF-THE-MONTH sign on you!
Curtain up soon! {toy} casts you in the {room} school play.
Audition warmup — say HELLO {count} different ways.
Try a {adjective} accent. {toy} nods approval.
Now act sad — let your {body_part} droop dramatically.
Costume time — drape a blanket and grab a {prop}.
Which role does {toy} cast you in?
Strike a hero pose — feet wide, hands on hips, chin high!
Cackle MWA-HA-HA and rub your hands together slowly.
Trip over your own feet (on purpose!) and bonk into {toy}.
SHOWTIME! Deliver your big line loud and proud.
Take three bows. {toy} hands you a bouquet of imaginary flowers!
{toy} discovers a secret hatch hidden under a {prop} in {room}!
Pry it open with your {body_part} — the hinges creak loudly.
Climb down a rope ladder, one rung at a time.
It's pitch dark. Click on your imaginary headlamp.
Tunnels branch in many directions — listen for echoes.
Three tunnels stretch ahead. Which does {toy} pick?
Follow the glow — {count} crystals light the walls.
Splash through ankle-deep water. Each step echoes.
The wind tugs you forward. Lean in and walk steady.
All tunnels meet in a giant chamber! A sleeping creature is curled up inside.
The creature stirs — do you wake it or sneak past?
It yawns and grins — turns out it's friendly! It walks you home with {toy}.
Tiptoe past holding your breath. You climb back up — quest survived!
